targetTranslation: he be (after لَمْ, connected to next word)
ayahArabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence

ayahArabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ

ayahArabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
ayahEnglish: A Messenger from Allāh, reciting purified scriptures

ayahArabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
ayahEnglish: A Messenger from Allāh, reciting purified scriptures

ayahArabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
ayahEnglish: A Messenger from Allāh, reciting purified scriptures

ayahArabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
ayahEnglish: A Messenger from Allāh, reciting purified scriptures

ayahArabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
ayahEnglish: A Messenger from Allāh, reciting purified scriptures

ayahArabic: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Within which are correct writings [i.e., rulings and laws].

ayahArabic: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Within which are correct writings [i.e., rulings and laws].

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

targetTranslation: those who (referring to the people who were given the Book)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
ayahEnglish: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَذٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
ayahEnglish: And they were not commanded except to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakāh. And that is the correct religion.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object of لِيَعْبُدُوا - to worship)
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَذٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
ayahEnglish: And they were not commanded except to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakāh. And that is the correct religion.

targetTranslation: those who make (something) pure/sincere (describing the state of يَعْبُدُوا)
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَذٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
ayahEnglish: And they were not commanded except to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakāh. And that is the correct religion.

targetTranslation: those who turn toward truth (describing how they worship اللَّهَ)
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَذٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
ayahEnglish: And they were not commanded except to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakāh. And that is the correct religion.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَذٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
ayahEnglish: And they were not commanded except to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakāh. And that is the correct religion.

targetTranslation: those who (referring to multiple people who كَفَرُوا۟)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

targetTranslation: Hell (as the object after فِى نَارِ - in the fire of)

targetTranslation: those who remain forever (as the object)

ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

targetTranslation: those (pointing to the disbelievers and polytheists mentioned before)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

targetTranslation: he/it was evil (as a permanent quality)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

targetTranslation: those ones there (far away) (subject of هُمْ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

ayahArabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
ayahEnglish: Their reward with their Lord will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allāh being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

ayahArabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
ayahEnglish: Their reward with their Lord will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allāh being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

targetTranslation: their Lord (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
ayahEnglish: Their reward with their Lord will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allāh being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

targetTranslation: gardens (as the subject, referring to جَزَآؤُهُمْ/their reward)

ayahArabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
ayahEnglish: Their reward with their Lord will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allāh being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

ayahArabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ

targetTranslation: forever (describing how long they will stay)
